7d4b2b0760d9.title: A Greene Forest
7d4b2b0760d9.notes: Source: HathiTrust — A greene forest : or, A naturall historie, wherein may bee seene first the most sufferaigne vertues in all the whole kinde of stones & mettals : next of plants, as of herbes, trees and shrubs : lastly of brute beastes, foules, fishes, creeping wormes, and serpents, and that alphabetically : so that a table shall not neede
